expectations.evidence: Uses fetch_table_features and rag_search instead of reading deriva://feature/Image/Diagnosis. The specific resource URI is never mentioned.
Step 3 mentions using rag_search to find 'whether they allow nulls' but never actually states which columns are required vs optional. No concrete required/optional breakdown is provided.
Step 2 shows query_table on 'Diagnosis_Type' with columns ['Name', 'Description', 'Synonyms'] to 'list every allowed term you can use as a value.'
Shows both add_feature_value (simple) and add_feature_value_record (complex) with correct parameters including table_name, feature_name, and entries with target_rid and values.
No mention of execution, create_execution, provenance, or wrapping feature value additions in an execution context anywhere in the response.
